text: Teleportation grabs - moves an entity to the player while dealing damage to it.
Checkpoint - sets/moves you to a checkpoint.
Portals - allows you to set up and destroy portals at two points.
$(o)Condition:$() Clear space within 4 blocks around player.
Spatial Rift: +10% damage; 15% chance to gain "Dash II" for 3 sec on attack.
Evasion Mastery: 10% chance to teleport 4 blocks away and avoid damage.
